programme.title: Defendant's Initial, Inconsistent Story
programme.desc: Prosecutors could not call Melody Farris to the stand. So, for jurors to hear her side of the story on what happened to her husband they played back both Interviews detectives recorded of her early in their murder investigation.

programme.title: Asssumptions Based On Evidence
programme.desc: The second recorded police interview of Melody Farris was not over yet in playback for jurors. In the long conversation, she went into details in the hours leading up to her husband, Gary's, murder.

programme.title: Lies, Denials And Distortions
programme.desc: The jury heard detectives raising doubt in her role in Melody Farris' claims. These doubts were heard on audio recording of her second extended police interview. Investigators were not letting her off the hook.

programme.title: Burn Pile Murder Trial
programme.desc: Melody Farris was accused of killing her husband, Gary Farris, and then burning his remains on their property. Prosecutors contended the couple's 38-year marriage had turned rocky over money and Melody had begun extramarital affairs.

programme.title: Burn Pile Murder Trial

programme.title: Burn Pile Murder Trial

programme.title: Burn Pile Murder Trial
programme.desc: Melody Farris was accused of killing her husband, Gary Farris, and then burning his remains on their property. Prosecutors contended the couple's 38-year marriage had turned rocky over money and Melody had begun extramarital affairs.

programme.title: Burn Pile Murder Trial
programme.desc: According to prosecutors in their opening statements, money was the motive for this murder. Next, Melody Farris' defense delivered their opening remarks to the jury. They claimed police acted on confirmation bias when they allegedly narrowed erroneously on the defendant for the death of her husband, Gary. A complicated family coupled with a complicated police investigation all led to fingers pointing at Melody Farris for first-degree murder.

programme.title: MeatEater Cooks with Kevin Gillespie
programme.desc: Join Janis Putelis and Kevin Gillespie as they prepare mountain lion sandwiches right from Janis's kitchen.

programme.title: MeatEater Cooks with Kevin Gillespie
programme.desc: On this episode of MeatEater Cooks, Mark Kenyon and Kevin Gillespie team up to prepare Moussaka with some hard earned ground venison. There is nothing fast about this technical layered dish, but the end result is worth the time in the kitchen. Level up your ground venison game with this restaurant-ready masterpiece.

programme.title: MeatEater Cooks with Kevin Gillespie
programme.desc: Seth Morris and Chester Floyd are no strangers to a good fish fry. In this episode, they're working with Chef Kevin Gillespie to find a slightly more elevated approach to this classic preparation. The end result is sure to leave you with a strong desire to head out and catch a limit of walleye.

programme.title: MeatEater Cooks with Kevin Gillespie
programme.desc: Kimi Werner certainly knows her way around a kitchen, and when it comes to anything seafood she is an absolute pro. But even pros can still learn something new on occasion and Kevin wants to share a method of preparing octopus with Kimi that he learned from a fellow chef, who is famous for his octopus preparations. The two work together to create a real showstopper of a dish, while sharing tips and tricks along the way that will make them both better cooks when they return home.

programme.title: MeatEater Cooks with Kevin Gillespie
programme.desc: In a new take on the classic “meat and bread” combo, Top Chef finalist and Fan Favorite Kevin Gillespie shows Steve how to whip up a crispy Torta Milanese with the mountain goat Steve shot while filming MeatEater’s 10th Season. The duo harvest some fresh veggies from Steve’s garden while discussing the challenges that face anyone who hunts the high mountains. Kevin shares the story of his last Mountain Goat hunt while showing Steve a few chef tricks.

programme.title: MeatEater Cooks with Kevin Gillespie
programme.desc: Wild + Whole is rooted in the values of sustainable eating, which often means making use of less common.

programme.title: MeatEater Cooks with Kevin Gillespie
programme.desc: Snow Goose gets a bad rap for being less than extraordinary when it comes to table fare.

programme.title: MeatEater Cooks with Kevin Gillespie
programme.desc: Steve Rinella and Chef Kevin Gillespie are back in the kitchen, this time to work some magic with meat from his New Mexico bull elk. Kevin shows shows Steve one of his favorite quick dinner fixes, Vietnamese Style Shakin Elk. The two discuss some of the mythology surrounding marinades and brining, plus Steve shows off his prized culinary possesion, his citrus juicer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Into the Clouds: Sitka Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella charters a float plane to drop off on a remote lake in Alaskas coastal rainforest for a solo.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Sweetest Meat: Alaskan Black Bear
programme.desc: As summer turns to fall, Steve heads into the backcountry of Alaska's Chugach Range.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Waters Edge: Waterfowl in Alaska
programme.desc: For a waterfowler's dream hunt, Steven Rinella joins his friend, wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell, on a remote trip to some untouched Alaska wetlands in search of ducks and geese. With a spread of decoys and a loyal retriever, they try to get their limit and fill their bellies with willow-spit roasted whole duck.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Rugged Peaks: Alaskan Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Every year, a handful of hunters draw a mountain goat permit to hunt the Mills Creek region of Alaskas Kenai.

programme.title: MeatEater - The New American Food Chain: Wild Pigs
programme.desc: On this trip, Steve travels to the Sacramento Valley in central California in search of a new challenge.

programme.title: MeatEater - Brotherhood, Badlands, and Pack Llamas: Montana Mule Deer
programme.desc: With a trio of cantankerous, spit-hurling pack llamas, Steven heads out.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Roughest Country: Texas Aoudad Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountainous desert backcountry of west Texas after Barbary sheep, or Aoudad. These introduced sheep from North Africa are hard to find and harder to hunt. Challenged by the harsh environment, rugged terrain, and elusive sheep, Steve finds this hunt to be one of the most difficult he has ever undertaken.

programme.title: MeatEater - Canyon Bottoms and Cookouts: Texas Javelina
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes to the canyons of the West Texas desert in search of javelina. In this broken, rocky terrain finding these unique critters isn't easy and getting a clear shot on a skunk pig with a bow is a whole other story. But Steve is inspired by the evidence of he finds of ancient hunters that used the area to prepare a meal that honors both the animal and our hunting ancestors.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Bucks and Small Game: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to Wisconsin to spend a few days on his buddys historical family farm to hunt small game.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Fair Chase: Arizona Mountain Lion
programme.desc: In the harsh desert Southwest, Steven Rinella has come to learn the truth about tracking a mountain lions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Crossing Borders: Mexican Bison
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountains of the Sonora Desert on a true, wild, free-ranging bison hunt.

programme.title: Capítulo 174
programme.desc: Diego kisses Roberta. Miguel and José work together to find information on Gastón. Diego reveals he doesn't really have amnesia. José's tutor shows up at Angelita's. Lupita decides to become Jewish. Diego asks Roberta to be his girlfriend.

programme.title: Capítulo 175
programme.desc: Diego convinces Roberta to be his girlfriend; they go on a date. Miguel saves José from her tutor; Gastón reveals that he hired the fake tutor. Miguel and Gastón get into a fist fight. Vico and Mía get revenge on Giovanni; Vico regrets it. Franco threatens Alma to stay away from Mía. Tomás tells Diego he's falling for Roberta. José and Gastón have a confrontation.

programme.title: Capítulo 176
programme.desc: Mia and Roberta concede about their joint parties. Gastón continues to avoid Mía's questions pertaining to anything in his personal life. Miguel convinces Mía to come with him to follow Gastón. Celina confides in Alma about her image issues then tells Alma about Diego and Roberta. Gastón's true self is revealed.

programme.title: Capítulo 177
programme.desc: Gastón asks Mía where she went with Miguel; she lies to him and he lies about his fight with Miguel. Tomás asks Diego why he hasn't broken up with Roberta, he lies saying he can't bear to see her cry. Celina develops a crush on Simon. Giovanni and Vico go on a date. Giovanni learns he will rejoin school soon. Mía decides to believe Gastón over Miguel. José and Téo become closer while confiding in one another.

programme.title: Capítulo 178
programme.desc: Nico's parents, Yuli and Joel, confront him about Lupita not being Jewish. However, Joel accepts their love while Yuli does not. Roberta gives Diego the signed Lenny Kravitz guitar. Karen demands her father to fire Nico's dad. Alma covers for Mía by saying Gastón is her boyfriend. The guys give Giovanni and Vico a hard time for dating. Gastón is angry that Mía and Miguel will be going out with Franco again. José reveals that her and Téo are officially dating. Valeria overhears Mía's conversation with Alma. Alma learns that Roberta and Diego are dating. Tomás blurts about the bet.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 180
programme.desc: Mía and Miguel go search for answers. Diego realizes he's falling in love with Roberta. José meets with a woman from the orphanage to find out who her tutor is. Pilar gives out cheat sheets in order to get revenge. Alma comes up with a plan to keep Mía from going to Paris. Roberta tells Celina the truth of the date with Simon.

programme.title: Capítulo 181
programme.desc: Miguel tells Mía a plan to find out if Gastón is a millionaire. Roberta learns from Simon and Tomás the truth about Diego's intentions. Mía asks Gastón for money for her birthday party; he agrees to pay for everything at no expense. José and Téo accept their abandonment and put their trust in each other; Gastón interrupts with threats to both. Roberta goes home; Alma slaps Diego for hurting Roberta. Miguel overhears Gastón planning to get money for Mía; she confronts Gastón demanding he tell her the truth, when he refuses she ends their relationship.

programme.title: Capítulo 182
programme.desc: Gastón tells Mía about himself and his past. Franco catches Mía and Gastón together. Gastón declares his love for Mía and asks Franco for a chance to prove he is worthy. Renata has suspicions about Madariaga. Franco and Miguel discuss Gastón. Alma takes Roberta far away to recover. Giovanni is allowed to return to school; he introduces his real parents to the class.

programme.title: Capítulo 183
programme.desc: Giovanni openly accepts his parents and his love for Vico in front of the entire school. Roberta wrecks on Simon's motorcycle. Miguel decides to finish with his revenge then return to Monterrey. Franco gets injured and Alma leaves him by himself. Mía has dance rehearsals; Gastón gets angry when she dances with Miguel. Tomás decides to stay with Pilar to get good grades. Gastón punishes Miguel.

programme.title: Hasta en las más mejores familias
programme.desc: Federica tiene un enamorado secreto. Carmelita Salinas entrevista a Federica y Ludovico Peluche. Federico niega que el hijo de Excelsa sea de él.

programme.title: Viva el Domingo
programme.desc: Federica hace planes para comer con sus papás pero Ludovico muere por ver el fútbol, así que arma una estrategia para regresar temprano a casa. En casa de sus suegros, Ludovico se las ingenia para estar enterado de cómo va el partido.

programme.title: Qué partida de dominó

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: El súper episodio del súper
programme.desc: La familia Peluche va al supermercado y luchan por un lugar de estacionamiento. Federica se pone celosa de que Ludovico habla gustosamente con la señorita de la carnicería.

programme.title: El atraco
programme.desc: Ludovico roba a su amigo Flavio y es encerrado; Federica es llevada a la estación de policías a declarar; unos ladrones entran a la casa de la familia Peluche.

programme.title: Juego de roles
programme.desc: Federica intenta seducir a Ludovico pero él no se da cuenta y ella llora porque perdieron la llama de la pasión. Ludovico y Federica buscan como reavivar su matrimonio y hacen un juego de cambio de personalidad.

programme.desc: Morris tiene la tarea de vender unos chocolates de la escuela y a su familia se les ocurre una idea. Lorena manda a arreglar la máquina de escribir de Frankie.

programme.title: Tendedero

programme.title: Amigos

programme.title: Auto nuevo
programme.desc: Luis le compra un auto nuevo a Silvia para que pasee con Luisito Jr. y Morris le tiene una mala noticia a sus padres: no le gusta el rock.

programme.title: Tacos veganos
programme.desc: Virginia y Borre terminan su relacion y no conforme, ella decide iniciar su propio negocio de tacos veganos. Arturo se encuentra un billete de mil pesos.

programme.title: Ropa de paca
programme.desc: Jorjáis decide invertir en un negocio de ropa de paca y descubre que no está solo, tiene competencia. Silvia y Luis buscan sobrevivir al primer día de guardería de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: Silvia party loving
programme.desc: Karla, la sobrina de Silvia, la visita en su casa, y ella finge que tiene una actitud muy cool y se va de parranda con ella. Pedro se siente mal y no puede salir de su cuarto.

programme.title: Nano por un día
programme.desc: La guardería está cerrada y Silvia y Luis no tienen quién cuide a Luisito Jr., por lo que tendrán que elegir entre los vecinos. Hipólito, Pedro y Germán buscan hacer válida la garantía de un celular.

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Fundación para los pobres

programme.title: Albóndigas vs. mollejas

programme.title: Coaching para vecinos

programme.title: Acapulco en la azotea
programme.desc: Don Hipólito recibe un filtro de agua, pero Germán termina arruinando la instalación. Además, Magdalena se va de vacaciones, pero su destino no es tan lujoso como dice.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Capítulo 174
programme.desc: Diego kisses Roberta. Miguel and José work together to find information on Gastón. Diego reveals he doesn't really have amnesia. José's tutor shows up at Angelita's. Lupita decides to become Jewish. Diego asks Roberta to be his girlfriend.

programme.title: Capítulo 175
programme.desc: Diego convinces Roberta to be his girlfriend; they go on a date. Miguel saves José from her tutor; Gastón reveals that he hired the fake tutor. Miguel and Gastón get into a fist fight. Vico and Mía get revenge on Giovanni; Vico regrets it. Franco threatens Alma to stay away from Mía. Tomás tells Diego he's falling for Roberta. José and Gastón have a confrontation.

programme.title: Capítulo 176
programme.desc: Mia and Roberta concede about their joint parties. Gastón continues to avoid Mía's questions pertaining to anything in his personal life. Miguel convinces Mía to come with him to follow Gastón. Celina confides in Alma about her image issues then tells Alma about Diego and Roberta. Gastón's true self is revealed.

programme.title: Capítulo 177
programme.desc: Gastón asks Mía where she went with Miguel; she lies to him and he lies about his fight with Miguel. Tomás asks Diego why he hasn't broken up with Roberta, he lies saying he can't bear to see her cry. Celina develops a crush on Simon. Giovanni and Vico go on a date. Giovanni learns he will rejoin school soon. Mía decides to believe Gastón over Miguel. José and Téo become closer while confiding in one another.

programme.title: Capítulo 178
programme.desc: Nico's parents, Yuli and Joel, confront him about Lupita not being Jewish. However, Joel accepts their love while Yuli does not. Roberta gives Diego the signed Lenny Kravitz guitar. Karen demands her father to fire Nico's dad. Alma covers for Mía by saying Gastón is her boyfriend. The guys give Giovanni and Vico a hard time for dating. Gastón is angry that Mía and Miguel will be going out with Franco again. José reveals that her and Téo are officially dating. Valeria overhears Mía's conversation with Alma. Alma learns that Roberta and Diego are dating. Tomás blurts about the bet.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 180
programme.desc: Mía and Miguel go search for answers. Diego realizes he's falling in love with Roberta. José meets with a woman from the orphanage to find out who her tutor is. Pilar gives out cheat sheets in order to get revenge. Alma comes up with a plan to keep Mía from going to Paris. Roberta tells Celina the truth of the date with Simon.

programme.title: Capítulo 181
programme.desc: Miguel tells Mía a plan to find out if Gastón is a millionaire. Roberta learns from Simon and Tomás the truth about Diego's intentions. Mía asks Gastón for money for her birthday party; he agrees to pay for everything at no expense. José and Téo accept their abandonment and put their trust in each other; Gastón interrupts with threats to both. Roberta goes home; Alma slaps Diego for hurting Roberta. Miguel overhears Gastón planning to get money for Mía; she confronts Gastón demanding he tell her the truth, when he refuses she ends their relationship.

programme.title: Capítulo 182
programme.desc: Gastón tells Mía about himself and his past. Franco catches Mía and Gastón together. Gastón declares his love for Mía and asks Franco for a chance to prove he is worthy. Renata has suspicions about Madariaga. Franco and Miguel discuss Gastón. Alma takes Roberta far away to recover. Giovanni is allowed to return to school; he introduces his real parents to the class.

programme.title: Capítulo 183
programme.desc: Giovanni openly accepts his parents and his love for Vico in front of the entire school. Roberta wrecks on Simon's motorcycle. Miguel decides to finish with his revenge then return to Monterrey. Franco gets injured and Alma leaves him by himself. Mía has dance rehearsals; Gastón gets angry when she dances with Miguel. Tomás decides to stay with Pilar to get good grades. Gastón punishes Miguel.

programme.title: Chantaje amoroso
programme.desc: Victoria le pide el divorcio a Nelson. Paula le dice a Cristina q encontró a victoria en su cama. Cristina hace escándalo a victoria y termina con el. Nelson chantajea a Aníbal.

programme.title: El regalo
programme.desc: Victoria decide irse a la Hda. Cristina quiere irse a el depa de Paula. Niki hiere a Guzmán. Nelson termina con Kendra. Beatriz busca alojo. Espanto contacta a Kendra.

programme.title: Arrepentimiento
programme.desc: Kendra amenaza a salcero. Jean Marie dice estar enamorado de Stefano. Beatriz y Felipe recogen a Guillo. Leo enfurese. Polita se mete at cuarto de Guzmán. Niki la ve. Kendra toma pastillas.

programme.title: Posible accidente
programme.desc: Víctoria se cae del caballo en la Hda. Ella le regala un medalla a Arriaga. Niki invita a un amigo por revancha a Guzmán. Kendra es llevada al hospital para revivirla. Cristina pelea con Lili.

programme.title: Matrimonio de apariencia
programme.desc: Por Niki Victoria aparenta seguir con Nelson. Lili pide vivir con Arriaga en la mansión. Cristina hace un escándalo yLuego escucha una conversación y se arrepiente.

programme.title: Season 1
programme.desc: The pilot outline for "Amores Verdaderos" "Amores Verdaderos pilot introduces Victoria, a successful woman engaged to Armando. She meets José Ángel, a humble gardener, leading to unexpected connections and family conflicts."

programme.title: Campaña en riesgo
programme.desc: Niki se sincera con Guzmán sobre su salud. Nelson le dice a Victoria q no le dará el divorcio. Victoria le ofrece un matrimonio de apariencia. Odette planea malograr la filmación de el video de meta imagen.
